{
  "intent_summary": "Enable IP forwarding, assign IPv6 address, and add default IPv6 route on router 9",

All required values are present in the intent.\n5. Correct tool/command family: Linux sysctl and vtysh for FRRouting.\n6. Correct syntax and argument order: sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1, vtysh -c 'configure terminal' followed by ip address add 2001:db8:9::1/64 dev 9-eth1 and ip route add default via 9-eth0.",
  "commands": [
    {"target_device": "9", "command": "sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1"},
    {"target_device": "9", "command": "vtysh -c 'configure terminal'"},
    {"target_device": "9", "command": "vtysh -c 'interface 9-eth1'"},
    {"target_device": "9", "command": "vtysh -c 'ip address add 2001:db8:9::1/64 dev 9-eth1'"},
    {"target_device": "9", "command": "vtysh -c 'interface 9-eth0'"},
    {"target_device": "9", "command": "vtysh -c 'ip address add 2001:db8:9::1/64 dev 9-eth0'"},
    {"target_device": "9", "command": "vtysh -c 'ip route add default via 9-eth0'"},
    {"target_device": "9", "command": "vtysh -c 'exit'"},
    {"target_device": "9", "command": "vtysh -c 'exit'"},
    {"target_device": "9", "command": "ip link set 9-eth1 up"}
  ],
  "needs_human": false,
  "missing": [],

}
